changeSet.author: legal-analysis
changeSet.sql: UPDATE precedents p SET title = COALESCE(NULLIF(BTRIM(d.file_name), ''), NULLIF(BTRIM(d.title), ''), p.title), content = COALESCE(NULLIF(BTRIM(p.content), ''), d.content), summary = CASE WHEN p.summary IS NULL OR BTRIM(p.summary) = '' THEN CASE WHEN d.content IS NULL OR BTRIM(d.content) = '' THEN p.summary WHEN CHAR_LENGTH(BTRIM(d.content)) <= 500 THEN BTRIM(d.content) ELSE SUBSTRING(BTRIM(d.content) FROM 1 FOR 500) || '...' END ELSE p.summary END FROM documents d WHERE p.source_document_id = d.id;
